name: Hollow Knight
description: Beneath the fading town of Dirtmouth sleeps a vast, ancient kingdom.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Randomizedreamers
options.description: Allow for Dreamers to be randomized into the item pool and opens their locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizeskills
options.description: Allow for Skills, such as Mantis Claw or Shade Soul, to be randomized into the item pool.

options.label: Randomizefocus
options.description: Removes the ability to focus and randomizes it into the item pool.

options.label: Randomizeswim
options.description: Removes the ability to swim in water and randomizes it into the item pool.

options.label: Randomizecharms
options.description: Allow for Charms to be randomized into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizekeys
options.description: Allow for Keys to be randomized into the item pool.

options.label: Randomizemaskshards
options.description: Allow for Mask Shard to be randomized into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizevesselfragments
options.description: Allow for Vessel Fragments to be randomized into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizecharmnotches
options.description: Allow for Charm Notches to be randomized into the item pool.

options.label: Randomizepaleore
options.description: Randomize Pale Ores into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizegeochests
options.description: Allow for Geo Chests to contain randomized items, as well as their Geo reward being randomized into the item pool.

options.label: Randomizejunkpitchests
options.description: Randomize the contents of junk pit chests into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizerancideggs
options.description: Randomize Rancid Eggs into the item pool and open their locations for randomization This option adds approximately 20 locations.

options.label: Randomizerelics
options.description: Randomize Relics (King's Idol, et al.) into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizewhisperingroots
options.description: Randomize the essence rewards from Whispering Roots into the item pool.

options.label: Randomizebossessence
options.description: Randomize boss essence drops, such as those for defeating Warrior Dreams, into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizegrubs
options.description: Randomize Grubs into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizemimics
options.description: Randomize Mimic Grubs into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizemaps
options.description: Randomize Maps into the item pool.

options.label: Randomizestags
options.description: Randomize Stag Stations unlocks into the item pool as well as placing randomized items on the stag station bell/toll.

options.label: Randomizelifebloodcocoons
options.description: Randomize Lifeblood Cocoon grants into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizegrimmkinflames
options.description: Randomize Grimmkin Flames into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizejournalentries
options.description: Randomize the Hunter's Journal as well as the findable journal entries into the item pool, and open their locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizenail
options.description: Removes the ability to swing the nail left, right and up, and shuffles these into the item pool.

options.label: Randomizegeorocks
options.description: Randomize Geo Rock rewards into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizebossgeo
options.description: Randomize boss Geo drops into the item pool and open those locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizesoultotems
options.description: Randomize Soul Refill items into the item pool and open the Soul Totem locations for randomization.

options.label: Randomizeloretablets
options.description: Randomize Lore items into the itempool, one per Lore Tablet, and place randomized item grants on the tablets themselves.

options.label: Randomizeelevatorpass
options.description: Adds an Elevator Pass item to the item pool, which is then required to use the large elevators connecting City of Tears to the Forgotten Crossroads and Resting Grounds.

options.label: Precisemovement
options.description: Places skips into logic which require extremely precise player movement, possibly without movement skills such as dash or claw.

options.label: Proficientcombat
options.description: Places skips into logic which require proficient combat, possibly with limited items.

options.label: Backgroundobjectpogos
options.description: Places skips into logic for locations which are reachable via pogoing off of background objects.

options.label: Enemypogos
options.description: Places skips into logic for locations which are reachable via pogos off of enemies.

options.label: Obscureskips
options.description: Places skips into logic which are considered obscure enough that a beginner is not expected to know them.

options.label: Shadeskips
options.description: Places shade skips into logic which utilize the player's shade for pogoing or damage boosting.

options.label: Infectionskips
options.description: Places skips into logic which are only possible after the crossroads become infected.

options.label: Fireballskips
options.description: Places skips into logic which require the use of spells to reset fall speed while in mid-air.

options.label: Spiketunnels
options.description: Places skips into logic which require the navigation of narrow tunnels filled with spikes.

options.label: Acidskips
options.description: Places skips into logic which require crossing a pool of acid without Isma's Tear, or water if swim is disabled.

options.label: Damageboosts
options.description: Places skips into logic which require you to take damage from an enemy or hazard to progress.

options.label: Dangerousskips
options.description: Places skips into logic which contain a high risk of taking damage.

options.label: Darkrooms
options.description: Places skips into logic which require navigating dark rooms without the use of the Lumafly Lantern.

options.label: Complexskips
options.description: Places skips into logic which require intense setup or are obscure even beyond advanced skip standards.

options.label: Difficultskips
options.description: Places skips into logic which are considered more difficult than typical.

options.label: Removespellupgrades
options.description: Removes the second level of all spells from the item pool.

options.label: Startlocation
options.description: Choose your start location.

options.label: Goal
options.description: The goal required of you in order to complete your run in Archipelago.

options.label: Grubhuntgoal
options.description: The amount of grubs required to finish Grub Hunt.

options.label: Whitepalace
options.description: Whether or not to include White Palace or not.

options.label: Extraplatforms
options.description: Places additional platforms to make traveling throughout Hallownest more convenient.

options.label: Addunshuffledlocations
options.description: Adds non-randomized locations to the location pool, which allows syncing of location state with co-op or automatic collection via collect.

options.label: Startinggeo
options.description: The amount of starting geo you have.

options.label: Deathlink
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.

options.label: Deathlinkshade
options.description: Sets whether to create a shade when you are killed by a DeathLink and how to handle your existing shade, if any.

options.label: Deathlinkbreaksfragilecharms
options.description: Sets if fragile charms break when you are killed by a DeathLink.

options.label: Minimumgeoprice
options.description: The minimum geo price for items in geo shops.

options.label: Maximumgeoprice
options.description: The maximum geo price for items in geo shops.

options.label: Minimumgrubprice
options.description: The minimum grub price in the range of prices that an item should cost from Grubfather.

options.label: Maximumgrubprice
options.description: The maximum grub price in the range of prices that an item should cost from Grubfather.

options.label: Minimumessenceprice
options.description: The minimum essence price in the range of prices that an item should cost from Seer.

options.label: Maximumessenceprice
options.description: The maximum essence price in the range of prices that an item should cost from Seer.

options.label: Minimumcharmprice
options.description: The minimum charm price in the range of prices that an item should cost for Salubra's shop item which also carry a charm cost.

options.label: Maximumcharmprice
options.description: The maximum charm price in the range of prices that an item should cost for Salubra's shop item which also carry a charm cost.

options.label: Randomcharmcosts
options.description: Total Notch Cost of all Charms together.

options.label: Minimumeggprice
options.description: The minimum rancid egg price in the range of prices that an item should cost from Jiji.

options.label: Maximumeggprice
options.description: The maximum rancid egg price in the range of prices that an item should cost from Jiji.

options.label: Eggshopslots
options.description: For each slot, add a location to the Egg Shop and a filler item to the item pool.

options.label: Slyshopslots
options.description: For each extra slot, add a location to the Sly Shop and a filler item to the item pool.

options.label: Slykeyshopslots
options.description: For each extra slot, add a location to the Sly Shop (requiring Shopkeeper's Key) and a filler item to the item pool.

options.label: Iseldashopslots
options.description: For each extra slot, add a location to the Iselda Shop and a filler item to the item pool.

options.label: Salubrashopslots
options.description: For each extra slot, add a location to the Salubra Shop, and a filler item to the item pool.

options.label: Salubracharmshopslots
options.description: For each extra slot, add a location to the Salubra Shop (requiring Charms), and a filler item to the item pool.

options.label: Legeatershopslots
options.description: For each extra slot, add a location to the Leg Eater Shop and a filler item to the item pool.

options.label: Grubfatherrewardslots
options.description: For each extra slot, add a location to the Grubfather and a filler item to the item pool.

options.label: Seerrewardslots
options.description: For each extra slot, add a location to the Seer and a filler item to the item pool.

options.label: Extrashopslots
options.description: For each extra slot, add a location to a randomly chosen shop a filler item to the item pool.

options.label: Splitcrystalheart
options.description: Splits the Crystal Heart into left- and right-only versions of the item.

options.label: Splitmothwingcloak
options.description: Splits the Mothwing Cloak into left- and right-only versions of the item.

options.label: Splitmantisclaw
options.description: Splits the Mantis Claw into left- and right-only versions of the item.

options.label: Costsanity
options.description: If enabled, most locations with costs (like stag stations) will have randomly determined costs.

options.label: Costsanityhybridchance
options.description: The chance that a CostSanity cost will include two components instead of one, e.g.

options.label: Costsanityeggweight
options.description: The likelihood of Costsanity choosing a Egg cost.

options.label: Costsanitygrubweight
options.description: The likelihood of Costsanity choosing a Grub cost.

options.label: Costsanityessenceweight
options.description: The likelihood of Costsanity choosing a Essence cost.

options.label: Costsanitycharmweight
options.description: The likelihood of Costsanity choosing a Charm cost.

options.label: Costsanitygeoweight
options.description: The likelihood of Costsanity choosing a Geo cost.
